itinerary.title: Maldives Arrival & Speedboat Transfer
itinerary.description: Fly into Malé. Meet our coordinator and take a scenic speedboat transfer to your hotel. Spend the evening relaxing on the beach.

itinerary.title: Snorkeling Safari & Underwater Photo Session
itinerary.description: Embark on a snorkeling excursion. Swim with colorful fish and sea turtles, with a professional guide taking free underwater photos of you.

itinerary.title: Local Island Cultural Tour & Sunset Fishing
itinerary.description: Tour a local island to experience Maldivian lifestyle. In the evening, try traditional line fishing during a spectacular sunset.

itinerary.title: Beachside Leisure & Speedboat Departure
itinerary.description: Enjoy free time on the white sand beaches. Take a speedboat back to Malé airport for your departure flight.

title: Maldives: Paradise Island Escape
description: Escape to a tropical wonderland where endless blue waters meet pristine white sand beaches. Designed for travelers seeking paradise on a budget, this 3-night, 4-day tropical getaway features comfortable hotel stays, delicious all-inclusive meals, and guided activities. Swim among vibrant coral reefs, explore local Maldivian islands, and try your hand at sunset line fishing—all with free underwater photography to preserve your island memories forever.
highlights: An affordable 4-day getaway to the world's most beautiful islands
Enjoy comfortable beachside accommodations with all-inclusive meals
Guided snorkeling safaris with free underwater photography included
Explore local islands to experience traditional Maldivian culture
Experience traditional line fishing at sunset on the Indian Ocean
Leisure time to unwind on pristine, powdery white sand beaches
